description: webhooks.fyi is a public reference site about webhook providers, webhook security patterns, operational practices, and best practices for building and consuming webhooks. It functions as an informational directory and knowledge base rather than a programmable service.
summary: webhooks.fyi appears to be a public documentation/content website only, with no documented developer integration surfaces such as APIs, GraphQL endpoints, MCP servers, or CLIs on the webhooks.fyi domain.
